extract: If you were looking for the chapter in Pokémon Zensho, see PZ04. Vermilion City (Japanese: クチバシティ Kuchiba City) is a city in Kanto. Situated near a sea inlet to the south, it serves as a popular sea port for ships such as the S.S. Anne. Vermilion Port is a home port for many ships. The S.S. Anne sails around the world and returns to Vermilion once a year. The S.S. Aqua sails from Olivine City in Johto to Vermilion Port. The Seagallop Ferries sail regularly to all of the Sevii Islands. Aside from the port, the other exits to the city are Route 11 and Diglett's Cave to the east. North of the city is Route 6.
